author: mpoffizial
title: Status laundering via auto-resolve: wontfix/false_positive penalties permanently erased by code changes
notes: Valid finding. auto_resolve_disappeared() converts wontfix/fixed/false_positive statuses to auto_resolved when issues vanish from scan output. auto_resolved is absent from all FAILURE_STATUSES_BY_MODE sets, so strict/verified_strict penalties are permanently erased. The verified_strict mode exists specifically to catch dismissed findings, and this path defeats that purpose. Originality docked because S033, S088, and S127 cover closely related auto-resolve/false_positive scoring gaps.
